Description: Unique random identifier for each recorded track object.
the initial version is 1 and is increased on every update of the data object. In case of a version conflict (when the client's object version is behind) the backend increas the version +2.
Unix timestamp of last modification in ms.
Value 'true' when the item was deleted. This information is needed in order to synchronize a delete request accross all customer devices.
Describes the category of the data item (always 'CloudRecordedTrack').
Title of the recorded track.
If the trip is a favorite. Possible values true and false.
if recording is active. Possible values true and false.
Bike which was driven to record a ride.
Unix timestamp in seconds when the trip started.
Latitude value of the start position.
Geoposition longitude value of the recorded track start position.
Unix timestamp in seconds when the trip ended.
Latitude value of the end position.
Geoposition longitude value of the recorded track stop position.
distance of the trip in meters.
Riding time of the trip in seconds.
Average speed of the trip in km/h.
Max speed of the trip in km/h.
Max outside temperature in C of the trip.
Min outside temperature in C of the trip.
Max elevation of the trip in meters.
Min elevation of the trip in meters.
Max engine rpm of the trip.
Maximum lean angle to the left in degree.
Maximum lean angle to the right in degree.
Maximum acceleration in g.
Maximum deceleration in g.
This object contains the list of track segment file pointers with meta information of the recorded trip incl. the filename which can be found in subfolder 'ProtocolBuffers' and the filesize.
